summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that the behavior-intent schema remains v1 while a deprecated behavior surface name is accepted and normalized to its canonical replacement.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: behavior intent deprecated surface alias normalization
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the documented workflow_conversation to conversation_continuity alias is marked satisfied.
notClaimed: Every historical behavior surface name has a compatibility alias
New emitters are mechanically prevented from writing deprecated names
The public docs enumerate every future alias that may be introduced

notableAssertions: an input intent profile may use the deprecated workflow_conversation behaviorSurface
BuildBehaviorIntentProfile accepts that deprecated input name
the returned profile uses the canonical conversation_continuity behaviorSurface
the behavior-intent schema constant remains cautilus.behavior_intent.v1

decision.reason: The runtime catalog keeps the behavior-intent schema at v1, maps workflow_conversation to conversation_continuity, and the focused unit test proves the deprecated input alias is silently normalized.
